title: Fit test - 2nd screen "X" button
scenario: Fit Test close button on second screen does not return user to Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on Fit Test to start the fit test flow
On the second screen of the Fit Test flow, tap the 'X' (close) button
expected: The Fit Test screen closes and the user is returned to Device Settings.
